name: llm-finetune
description: LLM fine-tuning with LoRA, QLoRA, full fine-tuning. Covers Unsloth, Axolotl, LLaMA-Factory, TRL, HuggingFace. Includes SFT, DPO, PPO, KTO, ORPO, preference optimization.
author: anwar

commands.name: llm:sft
commands.prompt:
Create SFT pipeline with:
- Models: Llama 3/3.1, Mistral, Qwen 2/2.5, Gemma 2, Phi 3, Yi, DeepSeek
- Formats: chat (ChatML, Llama-3, Mistral, Gemma), completion, instruct
- Data: ShareGPT, Alpaca, OpenHermes, custom JSON/JSONL/Parquet
- PEFT: LoRA (r, alpha, dropout, target_modules), QLoRA (4bit/8bit NF4), DoRA, PiSSA, VeRA, LoRA+, LoRA-GA
- Training: TRL SFTTrainer, Unsloth (2-5x faster), Axolotl, LLaMA-Factory
- Optimization: 8-bit AdamW, paged AdamW, GaLore, LOMO, Sophia, Muon
- Scheduler: cosine, linear, constant, polynomial, inverse_sqrt
- Context: 4k, 8k, 16k, 32k, 128k (YaRN, LongRoPE, Self-Extend)
- Packing: sequence packing, attention masking
- Logging: WandB, MLflow, TensorBoard, Neptune
- Checkpointing: safetensors, sharded, PEFT adapters only
- Evaluation: perplexity, eval datasets, generation samples
- Export: merged, GGUF, AWQ, GPTQ, ONNX, TensorRT-LLM

commands.name: llm:dpo
commands.prompt:
Create DPO pipeline with:
- Methods: DPO, KTO, IPO, ORPO, SimPO, CPO, TDPO
- Reference model: frozen base, or iterative (DDPO)
- Loss: sigmoid, hinge, ipo, kto_pair, cpo
- Beta: temperature, scheduling
- Data: preference pairs (chosen/rejected), rankings, feedback
- Models: same as SFT, with reward model for PPO
- Training: TRL DPOTrainer, LLaMA-Factory, Axolotl
- Evaluation: reward model scores, win rate, GPT-4 eval
- Comparison: DPO vs PPO vs SFT only
- Memory: gradient checkpointing, CPU offload, quantization

commands.name: llm:ppo
commands.prompt:
Create PPO pipeline with:
- Components: Actor (policy), Critic (value), Reward, Reference
- Reward model: trained on preference data, Bradley-Terry
- KL penalty: adaptive, fixed, clipped
- GAE: lambda, gamma
- Training: mini-batch, epochs, clip range
- TRL: PPOTrainer, Accelerate, DeepSpeed
- Memory: ZeRO-3, CPU offload, gradient accumulation
- Evaluation: reward, KL, response length, diversity
- Safety: reward hacking detection, constraint optimization
- Alternatives: GRPO (no critic), REINFORCE, RAHF

commands.name: llm:unsloth
commands.prompt:
Create Unsloth fine-tuning with:
- Speed: 2-5x faster, 70% less memory
- Models: Llama 3/3.1, Mistral, Qwen 2/2.5, Gemma 2, Phi 3, DeepSeek
- Quantization: 4-bit NF4, 8-bit, 16-bit, mixed
- LoRA: rank, alpha, dropout, target modules (auto-detect)
- Features: Flash Attention 2, xFormers, gradient checkpointing
- Data: packing, chat templates, custom formatting
- Training: SFT, DPO, ORPO, KTO, PPO
- Export: merged 16-bit, GGUF (llama.cpp), GGUF quantized, vLLM
- Multi-GPU: FSDP, DDP, tensor parallelism
- Integration: WandB, MLflow, HuggingFace Hub

commands.name: llm:llamafactory
commands.prompt:
Create LLaMA-Factory setup with:
- WebUI: Gradio interface for training, evaluation, export
- CLI: llamafactory-cli for automation
- Methods: Freeze, LoRA, QLoRA, GaLORA, LoRA+, PiSSA, DoRA, VeRA, LoRA-GA, Full
- Stages: PT, SFT, RM, PPO, DPO, KTO, ORPO, SimPO, CPO, SPPO
- Models: 100+ built-in (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, Gemma, Phi, Yi, DeepSeek, Baichuan, ChatGLM, InternLM)
- Quantization: bitsandbytes (4/8-bit), GPTQ, AWQ, HQQ, EETQ, FP8
- Data: 20+ templates, custom datasets, data processing
- Export: merged, adapters, GGUF, vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, ONNX
- Distributed: DeepSpeed (ZeRO-2/3), FSDP, DDP
- Monitoring: SwanLab, WandB, MLflow, TensorBoard

commands.name: llm:eval
commands.prompt:
Create evaluation suite with:
- Benchmarks: MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval, MBPP, MT-Bench, AlpacaEval, Arena-Hard, IFEval, BBH, MATH, GPQA
- Tasks: chat, code, math, reasoning, instruction following, RAG
- Frameworks: lm-evaluation-harness, OpenCompass, FastChat, MT-Bench
- Metrics: accuracy, pass@k, F1, ROUGE, BLEU, perplexity
- Judges: GPT-4, Claude, local LLM (Prometheus, Shepherd)
- Safety: TruthfulQA, ToxiGen, RealToxicityPrompts, HarmBench
- Efficiency: latency, throughput, memory, FLOPs
- Comparison: base vs SFT vs DPO vs other methods
- Reporting: tables, radar charts, leaderboards

agents.name: llm-engineer
agents.prompt: You are an LLM fine-tuning engineer. Expert in: LoRA/QLoRA/DoRA/PiSSA, SFT/DPO/KTO/ORPO/PPO, Unsloth/Axolotl/LLaMA-Factory/TRL, quantization (bitsandbytes/GPTQ/AWQ/HQQ), context extension (YaRN/LongRoPE), evaluation (MMLU/MT-Bench/HumanEval). Write production training scripts with config management, experiment tracking, and efficient GPU utilization.
